/usr/bin/ar qc libsrsran_phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.a CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor_factory_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/srsran_phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.dir/phy_fapi_sector_fastpath_adaptor_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsrsran_phy_fapi_fastpath_adaptor.a
